## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting focus to quality over quantity for content, especially for high-converting pages (e.g. integrations, comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Exploring new content areas like use case pages and templates to better address user search intent](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Investigating social media strategies to improve engagement, potentially leveraging individual team member accounts](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Implementing more detailed analytics and reporting to track content performance and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving towards quality over quantity, especially for high-converting pages](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Focusing on refreshing and improving existing content, particularly integration and comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Addressing search intent more effectively in content (e.g. "CMS for Next.js" vs. just integration instructions)](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Exploring new content areas like use case pages and templates to better match user needs](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [New Looker Studio dashboard created for overall and GrowthX-specific content performance](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Working on implementing conversion tracking and non-branded keyword reporting](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Exploring GA4 for more detailed funnel and path analysis](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Investigating tools like Profound for tracking LLM-based search performance](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Social Media Strategy

  - [Discussing potential shift from company account focus to leveraging individual team member accounts (e.g. Paul, Theo)](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Exploring content repurposing workflows for Twitter and Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Considering strategies to make company accounts feel more authentic and engaging](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [138 articles published to date](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [New content manager (Usman) ramping up to focus on quality and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Backlog reduction plan in place, aiming for normal delivery by week 34](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2507.0)

### Site Audit Findings

  - [Identified issue with anchor links resulting in broken links across the site](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Paul to create GitHub issue to address this problem](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to provide thoughts on social media strategy and potential GrowthX involvement](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Sydney to create Looker Studio dashboard for integration pages and competitor comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Sydney to investigate removing branded keywords from performance reports](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Golzar to ensure Sydney and Jason have correct GA4 access for exploration reports](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2567.0)
  - [Paul to create GitHub issue for anchor link problem identified in site audit](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [GrowthX team to start refreshing and improving existing integration and comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Strapi team to consider sharing Google Sheets with feature comparisons for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Explore potential for creating use case pages and templates (e.g. e-commerce, portfolio sites)](https://fathom.video/share/-84a6rmn8X7dXdH5wkq6bVKSyz3E3EwY?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
